name: Potato Pillows
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the potato, carrot, and zucchini into small pieces.
2. Dice the onion finely.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chopped vegetables with breadcrumbs, eggs, salt, and pepper. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of corn oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Divide the mixture into equal portions and shape each portion into a small pillow or patty.
6. Place the potato pillows into the hot skillet and flatten them slightly with a spatula.
7. Cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are well browned on all sides.
8. Remove from the pan and place on a cooling rack to drain excess oil.
9. Serve hot.
